notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the java-11-openjdk SRPM in CIQ Bridge for CentOS 7.9. It addresses 11 CVEs: CVE-2022-42252, CVE-2023-44487, CVE-2023-41080, CVE-2023-42794, CVE-2023-42795, and 6 more.
notes.title: Description
